opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis is particularly tricky; prompt engineering needs to account for provider idiosyncrasies and potential biases in their training data, which can skew macro predictions. A significant gotcha is ensuring data provenance and attribution—hallucinations are bad enough, but fabricated geopolitical events are catastrophic. Consider a hierarchical architecture where a smaller, faster model filters inputs before escalating to a larger, more expensive LLM for deeper analysis.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents for financial analysis and routing LLMs across providers gives me a unique perspective on the technical challenges presented by this project.
